ddls:
CREATE TABLE "strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name of the strain */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the strain */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the strain was collected */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the strain was collected */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the strain was collected */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the strain */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors who collected or described the strain */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the strain was published or reported */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article or report */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the strain */,
  "virus_type" TEXT /* Type of the influenza virus (A, B, C) */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the virus (e.g., H1N1, H3N2) */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host organism (e.g., human, bird) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the strain */,
  "vaccine_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of vaccines against the strain */,
  "is_new_emerging_strain" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the strain is newly emerging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_details" (
  "strain_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the strain detail record */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated strain */,
  "age_score" REAL /* Age score of the strain */,
  "avg_age" REAL /* Average age of the subjects from whom the strain was collected */,
  "named_clades" TEXT /* Clades associated with the strain */,
  "ctitersub" REAL /* CTiter sub-value */,
  "lbi" INTEGER /* LBI value */,
  "ep" INTEGER /* EP value */,
  "ne" INTEGER /* NE value */,
  "passage" TEXT /* Passage method used */,
  "glyc" INTEGER /* Glyc value */,
  "num_gender" INTEGER /* Number of genders represented in the data */,
  "rb" INTEGER /* RB value */,
  "isolate_id" TEXT /* ID of the isolate */,
  "num_date" REAL /* Date associated with the strain */,
  "dtitersub" REAL /* Dtitersub value */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject from whom the strain was collected */,
  "raw_date" TEXT /* Raw date of the record */,
  "dtiter" REAL /* Dtiter value */,
  "ctiter" REAL /* Ctiter value */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "clade_membership" TEXT /* Membership in clades */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the strain */,
  "mutation_rate" REAL /* Rate of mutations in the strain */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Rate of transmission of the strain */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Fatality rate associated with the strain */,
  "vaccine_coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the strain by existing vaccines */,
  "antigenic_distance" REAL /* Antigenic distance from known strains */,
  "serological_data" TEXT /* Serological data related to the strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strain_details_strain_id FOREIGN KEY ("strain_id") REFERENCES strains ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the country is located */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "healthcare_quality_index" REAL /* Healthcare quality index of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher or database */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the publisher */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was established */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)
column_names: Date when the strain was collected
Region where the strain was collected
Country where the strain was collected
Authors who collected or described the strain

Title of the article or report
